steps.expression: (() => { const trigger = document.querySelector("[data-role='portfolio-summary-scope-selector-trigger']"); if (!trigger) { return { clicked: false, reason: "missing-trigger" }; } trigger.click(); return { clicked: true }; })()

(() => { const perpsOption = document.querySelector("[data-role='portfolio-summary-scope-selector-option-perps']"); const pnlTab = document.querySelector("[data-role='portfolio-chart-tab-pnl']"); const balancesTab = document.querySelector("[data-role='account-info-tab-balances']"); if (!perpsOption || !pnlTab || !balancesTab) { return { selectedPerps: Boolean(perpsOption), selectedPnl: Boolean(pnlTab), selectedBalances: Boolean(balancesTab) }; } perpsOption.click(); pnlTab.click(); balancesTab.click(); return { selectedPerps: true, selectedPnl: true, selectedBalances: true }; })()

(() => { const trigger = document.querySelector("[data-role='portfolio-summary-scope-selector-trigger']"); const pnlTab = document.querySelector("[data-role='portfolio-chart-tab-pnl']"); const balancesTab = document.querySelector("[data-role='account-info-tab-balances']"); const inspectionHeader = document.querySelector("[data-role='portfolio-inspection-header']"); const actionRow = document.querySelector("[data-role='portfolio-actions-row']"); const depositAction = document.querySelector("[data-role='portfolio-action-deposit']"); const explorerLink = document.querySelector("[data-role='portfolio-inspection-explorer-link']"); return { scopeExpanded: trigger?.getAttribute("aria-expanded") === "true", scopeLabel: trigger?.textContent?.trim() || null, pnlPressed: pnlTab?.getAttribute("aria-pressed") || null, balancesPressed: balancesTab?.getAttribute("aria-pressed") || null, inspectionHeaderPresent: Boolean(inspectionHeader), actionRowPresent: Boolean(actionRow), depositPresent: Boolean(depositAction), explorerHref: explorerLink?.getAttribute("href") || null }; })()
